summary: Implements bounded recovery for malformed autonomous review artifacts; tests and workflow changes present and unit CI passed.

requirement_checks.requirement: If autonomous review emits invalid review.json content, the failure is detected and routed into a bounded repair path instead of immediately blocking the PR.
evidence: tests/prepare-review-artifact-repair.test.mjs :: validates repair attempts increment and blocking behavior
scripts/prepare-review-artifact-repair.mjs :: implements repair-state derivation and outputs
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml :: review-processing-failed job invokes prepare-repair and conditionally schedules review-artifact-repair
CI: workflow run id 23307124739 — unit: success

requirement_checks.requirement: Repair prompts include stored review-artifact failure context so repair runs see the failure message.
evidence: tests/build-stage-prompt.test.mjs :: 'repair prompt surfaces stored review artifact failure details'
scripts/build-stage-prompt.mjs :: reads metadata.lastReviewArtifactFailure and includes it in repair prompt
CI: workflow run id 23307124739 — unit: success

requirement_checks.requirement: Successful repair resumes the review flow (metadata reset, review re-run and pass handling).
evidence: tests/process-review.test.mjs :: 'processReview marks PR ready and comments on pass decision'
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml :: review-artifact-repair-succeeded job records successful repair metadata
CI: workflow run id 23307124739 — unit: success

requirement_checks.requirement: Exhausted repair attempts block the PR with an explicit failure comment referencing malformed artifacts.
evidence: tests/prepare-review-artifact-repair.test.mjs :: 'blocks when repair attempts exceed limit'
scripts/lib/failure-comment.mjs :: comment headline and artifact links for review_artifact_contract
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml :: review-artifact-repair-failed falls back to handle-stage-failure when blocked
CI: workflow run id 23307124739 — unit: success

requirement_checks.requirement: Delivery/configuration failures (e.g., unresolved methodology) still block immediately and are not routed to artifact repair.
evidence: scripts/process-review.mjs :: classifyReviewArtifactsFailure maps methodology resolution failures to configuration + review_delivery phase
tests/process-review.test.mjs :: 'classifyReviewArtifactsFailure keeps invalid methodology failures in review_delivery'
CI: workflow run id 23307124739 — unit: success

requirement_checks.requirement: Add a dedicated failure type for review-artifact contract errors and propagate it through classification and comments.
evidence: scripts/lib/failure-classification.mjs :: defines FAILURE_TYPES.reviewArtifactContract
scripts/process-review.mjs :: classifyReviewArtifactsFailure returns FAILURE_TYPES.reviewArtifactContract for content failures
tests/failure-comment.test.mjs :: asserts failure-comment handles FAILURE_TYPES.reviewArtifactContract

requirement_checks.requirement: Implement scripts/prepare-review-artifact-repair.mjs to derive repair state and outputs for workflow orchestration.
evidence: scripts/prepare-review-artifact-repair.mjs :: new implementation and exported helpers
tests/prepare-review-artifact-repair.test.mjs :: unit tests for normal, exhausted, and invalid-type cases

requirement_checks.requirement: Include stored failure details in repair prompts via build-stage-prompt.mjs.
evidence: scripts/build-stage-prompt.mjs :: includes metadata.lastReviewArtifactFailure when present
tests/build-stage-prompt.test.mjs :: covers repair prompt failure-context inclusion

findings.title: Missing repair-log.md in run artifacts
findings.details: .factory/runs/54/ does not contain a 'repair-log.md' artifact while build-stage-prompt lists it as an expected artifact. Prompts handle missing files, but including a minimal file would make live diagnostics clearer.
findings.recommendation: Add an empty or minimal 'repair-log.md' to the run artifacts when emitting run artifacts for review/repair runs.

findings.title: Recommend integration smoke test
findings.details: The change affects workflow orchestration and multiple scripts; unit tests are comprehensive, but an end-to-end smoke test on a non-critical PR would validate runtime interactions with GitHub and actions environment.
findings.recommendation: Run a manual or staged integration test exercising review -> repair -> resume on a test PR to confirm behavior in the live environment.
